summary: Policy for high-risk command preflight gating and token validation.

strict_gate.missing_token_error: Strict preflight gate is enabled. Provide --preflight-token from 'agentic-workspace preflight --format json'.
strict_gate.invalid_token_error: Invalid --preflight-token format. Expected token from 'agentic-workspace preflight --format json'.
strict_gate.future_token_error: Preflight token timestamp is in the future. Regenerate it with 'agentic-workspace preflight --format json'.
strict_gate.stale_token_error_template: Stale preflight token ({age_seconds}s old; max {max_age_seconds}s). Regenerate it with 'agentic-workspace preflight --format json'.
